component.name: dq.api
component.brief: Public API types for the data quality component.
component.description:
Defines the NATS messaging protocol and public domain types for the data
quality component: request/response structs for change reasons, change
reason categories, origin/nature/treatment dimensions, catalogs, datasets,
methodologies, coding schemes, data domains, and subject areas.
Has minimal dependencies and is safe to link from any other component.
